title: Ellysium Lite
description: Simple, complete, optimised. A client-side modpack made to improve your RolePlaying on low end devices, and turn it into a feature-rich experience.
body:
# Promoted Server - Servidor Indicado
![Black and purple banner, written "Ellysium RP".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59b8ea40c917b4d8f76443b81c59023cb49c732a.png)
> Ellysium is a RP|RPG Fantasy server, with its own story line, mechanics, bosses, and made entirely with plugins. The server has a receptive community and a small player base.
# Sumary - Sumário
- Content Pages - Páginas dos Conteúdos
- Resource Packs - Pacotes de Recurso
- Mods/not finished - Modificações/falta
## Content Pages
All the packages below belong to the latest version of the modpack.
### Resource Packs
Fast Better Grass [download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass)
### Mods/not finished
- Lithium  
- Melody  
- Mod Menu  
- ModernFix  
- More Culling  
- No Chat Reports  
- Noisium  
- Nvidium  
- OptiGUI  
- Simple Voice Chat  
- Simple Voice Chat Discord Bridge  
- Sodium  
- ThreadTweak  
- Very Many Players (Fabric)  
- Voice Chat Interaction  
- Xaero's Minimap (Fair-Play)  
- Xaero's World Map  
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)  
- Customizable Player Models Simple Voice Chat compat  
- BadOptimizations  
- CIT Resewn  
- Cloth Config API  
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)  
- Cull Leaves  
- Customizable Player Models  
- Dynamic FPS  
- Enhanced Block Entities  
- Entity Culling  
- Exordium  
- Fabric API  
- Fabric Language Kotlin  
- Fabric Voice Chat Broadcast
